basic_details.job_title: Gliders India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Company Secretary, DGM and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Company Secretary, DGM and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Gliders India Limited (Gliders India) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Company Secretary, DGM and other posts! Published under Advertisement No. 03/2026 on the official Gliders India website, this recruitment drive offers 6 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants with qualifications such as Bachelor's Degree in Textile Technology, Engineering, Computer Science, IT, or Company Secretary registration and relevant experience can apply through email on or before 20 June 2026. Candidates up to 65 years of age for DGM posts and up to 50 years for Senior Manager posts are eligi

age_limit.age_details: Max 65 years for DGM posts, Max 50 years for Sr. Manager posts.
age_limit.details: DGM – Product Development: Maximum 65 years DGM – Research &Development: Maximum 65 years Sr. Manager Quality Control: Maximum 50 years Sr. Manager Information Technology: Maximum 50 years Sr. Manager Marketing (International): Maximum 50 years Company Secretary: Maximum 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in relevant fields like Textile Technology, Engineering, Computer Science, IT, or Company Secretary registration. Experience requirements vary by post.
qualification.details: DGM – Product Development (PD): Bachelor's Degree in Textile Technology / Textile Engineering / Technical Textiles / Polymer Science / Material Science or equivalent. 15 years of experience. Master's Degree / Ph.D. in relevant field and experience in ballistic protection systems, NBC suits, protective fabrics or smart textiles are desirable. DGM – Research &Development (R&D): Retired Technical officer 'A' / Scientist 'D' from DRDO/NIFT/CSIR with 15 Years of experience in relevant field. Sr. Manager Quality Control (QC): Bachelor's Degree in Engineering / Technology. 05 years of industrial experience in quality control/implementation of quality tools. Certification in Quality Management Systems/ Six Sigma / Lead Auditor Course is desirable. Sr. Manager Information Technology (IT): B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Information Technology or MCA. Minimum 05 years of working experience. Strong problem-solving skills, knowledge of database management systems and ISQL/SQL, proficiency in programming languages, Web Based Reporting System, Dashboard Development, Website Development, familiarity with software development methodologies, and knowledge in Linux OS are desirable. Sr. Manager Marketing (International): Bachelor's Degree in Engineering / Technology. MBA in Marketing / International Business. Minimum 05 years of relevant experience in marketing, sales, business development or commercial functions. Experience in defence production or defence marketing, handling government tenders, institutional marketing, strategic partnerships, and international business of Defence Sector are desirable. Company Secretary: Registered Company Secretary (C.S.) with the Institute of Company Secretaries of India. Minimum 05 years post-qualification experience as Company Secretary/Compliance Officer/Legal Officer or equivalent. Candidates with LLB background and experience in Public Sector and knowledge about relevant DPE functioning are desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Annual CTC ranging from Rs. 14,40,000/- for DGM - Product Development, and Last Basic Pay - Pension (Ex. DA) up to Rs. 12,00,000/- for other posts.
salary_details.dgm – research &development (r&d): Last Basic Pay - Pension (Ex. DA) Rs. 9,00,000/-
salary_details.sr. manager quality control (qc): Last Basic Pay - Pension (Ex. DA) Rs. 9,00,000/-
salary_details.sr. manager information technology (it): Last Basic Pay - Pension (Ex. DA) Rs. 9,00,000/-
salary_details.sr. manager marketing (international): Last Basic Pay - Pension (Ex. DA) Rs. 12,00,000/-
salary_details.company secretary: Salary details not explicitly mentioned for this post.

selection_process: Written & Interview or Interview only (as per discretion of GIL) Proposal submission with supporting documents Selection based on Qualifications
accreditation and achievements Weighted chart for Qualifications/Experiences (50%) and Interview (50%) Suitability recommendation from interview committee will preside over marking system.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gliders India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
